forager.util

Class Vector2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.util.Vector2D

  • public class Vector2D
extends Object
    A 2D vector.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      double x
      The x value.
      double y
      The y value.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Vector2D()
      Create a (0,0) vector.
      Vector2D(double x, double y)
      Create a vector from its x and y value.
      Vector2D(Point2D.Double position)
      Create a vector from a point.
      Vector2D(Point2D.Double start, Point2D.Double end)
      Create the vector between the two points.
      Vector2D(Vector2D v)
      Copy a vector.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Vector2D add(Vector2D other)
      Add two vectors and return the result.
      boolean equals(Object other) 
      static Vector2D fromPolar(double r, double theta)
      Create a new vector from its polar coordinate.
      double getOrientation()
      Return the Theta of the vector;
      Vector2D iadd(Vector2D other)
      Add a vector.
      Vector2D iscalarMul(double s)
      Multiply the vector by a scalar.
      Vector2D isub(Vector2D other)
      Substract a vector.
      double norm()
      Return the norm of the vector.
      Vector2D rotate(double theta)
      Get a copy of this vector rotated.
      Vector2D scalarMul(double s)
      Return the vector multiplied by a scalar.
      Vector2D sub(Vector2D other)
      Substract two vectors and return the result.
      Point2D.Double toPoint()
      Return a point version of the vector.
      String toString()
      Display the Vector.
      Vector2D unitVector()
      Return the unit vector.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Vector2D

        public Vector2D()
        Create a (0,0) vector.

      • Vector2D

        public Vector2D(double x,
        double y)
        Create a vector from its x and y value.
        Parameters:
        x - The x value.
        y - The y value.

      • Vector2D

        public Vector2D(Point2D.Double start,
        Point2D.Double end)
        Create the vector between the two points.
        Parameters:
        start - The start point of the vector.
        end - The end point of the vector.

      • Vector2D

        public Vector2D(Point2D.Double position)
        Create a vector from a point.
        Parameters:
        position - The point.

      • Vector2D

        public Vector2D(Vector2D v)
        Copy a vector.
        Parameters:
        v - The vector.

    • Method Detail

      • fromPolar

        public static Vector2D fromPolar(double r,
                 double theta)
        Create a new vector from its polar coordinate.
        Parameters:
        r - The vector norm.
        theta - The vector angle.
        Returns:
        The new vector.

      • add

        public Vector2D add(Vector2D other)
        Add two vectors and return the result.
        Parameters:
        other - The other vector to add.
        Returns:
        The sum of the vectors.

      • iadd

        public Vector2D iadd(Vector2D other)
        Add a vector.
        Parameters:
        other - The other vector to add.

      • sub

        public Vector2D sub(Vector2D other)
        Substract two vectors and return the result.
        Parameters:
        other - The vector to substract.
        Returns:
        The difference between the vectors.

      • isub

        public Vector2D isub(Vector2D other)
        Substract a vector.
        Parameters:
        other - The vector to substract.

        Returns:
        The vector multiplied by the scalar.

        Multiply the vector by a scalar.

        s - The scalar.

        Return the norm of the vector.

        The norm of the vector.

        Return the unit vector.

        The unit vector.

        public double getOrientation()
        Return the Theta of the vector;
        Returns:
        The theta of the vector.

        public Vector2D rotate(double theta)
        Get a copy of this vector rotated.
        Parameters:
        theta - The angle of the rotation.
        Returns:
        A rotated vector.
